sourceLayout.note: No .blend source files or export_hero.py script exist in this checkout yet, and Blender is not installed on this workstation. tools/assets/build-heroes.mjs checks for a resolvable Blender binary plus both the class .blend and the shared export script before attempting a Blender export, and falls back to the repository-owned authored-recipe exporter (tools/assets/generate_assets.mjs) whenever either is missing.

exportRules: Apply object transforms; positive uniform scale only, ideally [1,1,1].
Export normals; export tangents when normal maps are used.
Export UV0; UV1 only where AO/lightmap policy requires it.
Export deformation bones and required socket nodes; bake constraints/control rig.
Limit skin influences to four per vertex and normalize.
Export named actions from explicit frame ranges, starting at zero.
Reset pose between actions to avoid cross-clip leakage.
Strip cameras, lights, control widgets, debug geometry, and proxy outlines.
Preserve approved custom properties/extras (schema v2 metadata, rig aliases, sockets).
Run glTF validation before optimization and after final output.

optimization.meshCompression: meshopt-or-draco (choose after visual comparison against the Gunner golden asset)

provenance.notes: tools/assets/generate_assets.mjs embeds a provenanceHash and a stats block (triangles/vertices/bones/clips) in every hero root's userData/extras, derived only from class id, LOD, resolution, rig id, schema version, bone names, and clip names (no wall-clock input). tools/assets/build-heroes.mjs additionally sha256-hashes the emitted GLB bytes per class/LOD and prints a build-level provenance report to stdout (and to --report=<path> when given).

buildModes.blender: Used only when a Blender binary is resolvable (BLENDER_BIN env var, --blender-bin=<path>, or 'blender' on PATH) and the target class's <classId>.blend plus the shared export_hero.py both exist on disk.
buildModes.authored-recipe: Repository-owned deterministic procedural exporter (tools/assets/generate_assets.mjs). Used whenever the Blender path above is unavailable, which is the current state of this workstation. This is a build-time, versioned, offline source -- never a runtime primitive fallback -- and every asset it emits carries provenance.mode = "authored-recipe" so the distinction is always inspectable.
